title: ToolTreaux Carbon Steel Punch Set Leather Working Tools, 6pc
description:
The ToolTreaux 6pc Universal Heavy Duty Leather Hollow Punch Artisan Crafter Tool Set is ideal for leather working and for making clean holes in tough materials such as leather, plastic, rubber, vinyl and other thick fabrics. Each unit is 3.5" in length, constructed from heavy duty hardened carbon steel (45-48 HRC), and feature knurled body construction for a secure grip when in use. This leather working tool set it not only great for working with fabrics but can be used for other craft and hobby projects too. The set is handy to have for customization or repairing belts, shoes, purses and handbags, jackets and more! Punch sizes include with this 6pc set are: 5/16 inch (8mm), 1/4 inch (6.5mm), 7/32 inch (5.5mm), 3/16 inch (5mm), 5/32 inch (4mm) and 1/8 inch (3mm).

ToolTreaux Carbon Steel Punch Set Leather Working Tools, 6pc

The ToolTreaux 6pc Universal Heavy Duty Leather Hollow Punch Artisan Crafter Tool Set is ideal for leather working and for making clean holes in tough materials such as leather, plastic, rubber, vinyl and other thick fabrics.

Key Features

  • 6PC PUNCH SET: The ToolTreaux 6pc punch set is ideal for leather working and for making clean holes in tough materials such as leather, plastic, rubber, vinyl and other thick fabrics
  • LEATHER REPAIR KIT: The 6pc leather hollow punch set is also handy to have on hand for customization and for repairing belts, shoes, purses and handbags, jackets and even furniture
  • CARBON STEEL MATERIAL: Each punch is 3.5 inches in length, constructed from heavy duty hardened carbon steel (45-48 HRC), and feature knurled body construction for durable longevity and ease of use when handling
  • HOLLOW PUNCH SIZES INCLUDED: 5/16 inch (8mm), 1/4 inch (6.5mm), 7/32 inch (5.5mm), 3/16 inch (5mm), 5/32 inch (4mm) and 1/8 inch (3mm)
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Overall Dimensions: 9 x 6 x 1 inches; Color: Silver; Weight: 0.2lbs; Material: Carbon Steel

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TT-21-6PHLPS
  • UPC: 810058482389
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: Compact

Each unit is 3.5" in length, constructed from heavy duty hardened carbon steel (45-48 HRC), and feature knurled body construction for a secure grip when in use. This leather working tool set it not only great for working with fabrics but can be used for other craft and hobby projects too. The set is handy to have for customization or repairing belts, shoes, purses and handbags, jackets and more!
